-- Barracuda Firewall Parser: barracuda_firewall_logs_latest
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (4001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Ingestion Mode: Syslog

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local tonumber = tonumber
local string = string
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format
local string_lower = string.lower
local tostring = tostring
local pairs = pairs

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local PATTERNS = {
    ip = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$",
    timestamp = "%d%d%d%d%-%d%d%-%d%d %d%d:%d%d:%d%d",
    action = "(ALLOW|DENY|DROP|BLOCK|PERMIT)"
}

-- Severity mapping for firewall events
local SEVERITY_MAP = {
    critical = 5,
    high = 4,
    medium = 3,
    low = 2,
    info = 1,
    informational = 1
}

-- Action to activity mapping
local ACTION_MAP = {
    ALLOW = {activity_id = 1, type_uid = 400101},
    PERMIT = {activity_id = 1, type_uid = 400101},
    DENY = {activity_id = 2, type_uid = 400102},
    DROP = {activity_id = 2, type_uid = 400102},
    BLOCK = {activity_id = 2, type_uid = 400102}
}

-- Validation helper functions
local function validate_ip(ip)
    if not ip or type(ip) ~= "string" then return false end
    local parts = {ip:match("^(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)$")}
    if #parts ~= 4 then return false end
    for i = 1, 4 do
        local n = tonumber(parts[i])
        if not n or n < 0 or n > 255 then return false end
    end
    return true
end

local function validate_port(port)
    local n = tonumber(port)
    return n and n >= 0 and n <= 65535
end

local function parse_timestamp(ts_str)
    if not ts_str or type(ts_str) ~= "string" then return nil end
    
    -- Try to extract timestamp from syslog format
    local year, month, day, hour, min, sec = ts_str:match("(%d%d%d%d)%-(%d%d)%-(%d%d) (%d%d):(%d%d):(%d%d)")
    if year then
        return os_time({
            year = tonumber(year),
            month = tonumber(month),
            day = tonumber(day),
            hour = tonumber(hour),
            min = tonumber(min),
            sec = tonumber(sec)
        }) * 1000
    end
    
    -- Fallback to numeric timestamp
    local ts = tonumber(ts_str)
    if ts then
        return ts < 1e10 and ts * 1000 or ts
    end
    
    return nil
end

local function extract_firewall_fields(message)
    if not message or type(message) ~= "string" then return {} end
    
    local fields = {}
    
    -- Extract action
    local action = message:match(PATTERNS.action)
    if action then
        fields.action = action
    end
    
    -- Extract source IP and port
    local src_ip, src_port = message:match("src=([%d%.]+):?(%d*)")
    if src_ip then
        fields.src_ip = src_ip
        if src_port and src_port ~= "" then
            fields.src_port = src_port
        end
    end
    
    -- Extract destination IP and port  
    local dst_ip, dst_port = message:match("dst=([%d%.]+):?(%d*)")
    if dst_ip then
        fields.dst_ip = dst_ip
        if dst_port and dst_port ~= "" then
            fields.dst_port = dst_port
        end
    end
    
    -- Extract protocol
    local protocol = message:match("proto=(%w+)")
    if protocol then
        fields.protocol = protocol
    end
    
    -- Extract interface
    local interface = message:match("if=(%w+)")
    if interface then
        fields.interface = interface
    end
    
    -- Extract rule
    local rule = message:match("rule=([^%s]+)")
    if rule then
        fields.rule = rule
    end
    
    return fields
end

function process(event, emit)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not event or type(event) ~= "table" then
        return
    end
    
    -- Timestamp processing - REQUIRED FIELD
    local timestamp = event.timestamp or event.time or event["@timestamp"]
    local parsed_time = nil
    if timestamp then
        parsed_time = parse_timestamp(timestamp)
    end
    if not parsed_time then
        parsed_time = os_time() * 1000
    end
    
    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant structure with ALL required fields
    event.class_uid = 4001
    event.class_name = "Network Activity"
    event.category_uid = 4
    event.category_name = "Network Activity"
    event.time = parsed_time
    event.severity_id = 1  -- Default severity
    event.activity_id = 99  -- Default activity
    event.type_uid = 400199  -- Default type
    
    -- Initialize metadata
    event.metadata = event.metadata or {}
    event.metadata.product = {
        name = "Barracuda Firewall",
        vendor_name = "Barracuda Networks"
    }
    event.metadata.version = "1.0.0"
    
    -- Initialize unmapped table
    event.unmapped = event.unmapped or {}
    
    -- Message and raw data handling
    local message = event.message or event.msg or event.raw_data
    if message then
        event.message = message
        event.raw_data = message
        
        -- Extract firewall-specific fields from message
        local fw_fields = extract_firewall_fields(message)
        
        -- Process extracted fields - set activity_id and type_uid based on action
        if fw_fields.action then
            local action_info = ACTION_MAP[fw_fields.action]
            if action_info then
                event.activity_id = action_info.activity_id
                event.type_uid = action_info.type_uid
                if fw_fields.action == "DENY" or fw_fields.action == "DROP" or fw_fields.action == "BLOCK" then
                    event.activity_name = "Traffic Deny"
                    event.severity_id = 3
                else
                    event.activity_name = "Traffic Allow"
                    event.severity_id = 1
                end
            end
            event.disposition = fw_fields.action
            event.disposition_id = (fw_fields.action == "ALLOW" or fw_fields.action == "PERMIT") and 1 or 2
        end
        
        -- Source endpoint
        if validate_ip(fw_fields.src_ip) then
            event.src_endpoint = {
                ip = fw_fields.src_ip
            }
            if validate_port(fw_fields.src_port) then
                event.src_endpoint.port = tonumber(fw_fields.src_port)
            end
        end
        
        -- Destination endpoint
        if validate_ip(fw_fields.dst_ip) then
            event.dst_endpoint = {
                ip = fw_fields.dst_ip
            }
            if validate_port(fw_fields.dst_port) then
                event.dst_endpoint.port = tonumber(fw_fields.dst_port)
            end
        end
        
        -- Connection info
        if fw_fields.protocol then
            event.connection_info = {
                protocol_name = fw_fields.protocol:upper()
            }
        end
        
        -- Rule information
        if fw_fields.rule then
            event.rule = {
                name = fw_fields.rule
            }
        end
        
        -- Interface information
        if fw_fields.interface then
            event.device = event.device or {}
            event.device.interface_name = fw_fields.interface
        end
    end
    
    -- Process other event fields
    if event.hostname or event.host then
        event.device = event.device or {}
        event.device.hostname = event.hostname or event.host
    end
    
    if event.facility then
        event.metadata.facility = event.facility
    end
    
    -- Severity processing - ensure severity_id is always set
    if event.severity then
        local sev = string_lower(tostring(event.severity))
        if SEVERITY_MAP[sev] then
            event.severity_id = SEVERITY_MAP[sev]
        elseif tonumber(event.severity) then
            local num_sev = tonumber(event.severity)
            if num_sev >= 0 and num_sev <= 7 then
                event.severity_id = 8 - num_sev -- Convert syslog to OCSF
            end
        end
    end
    
    if event.priority then
        event.metadata.priority = tonumber(event.priority)
    end
    
    -- Store unmapped fields (preserve original fields that aren't mapped)
    local mapped_fields = {
        message = true, timestamp = true, time = true, ["@timestamp"] = true,
        hostname = true, host = true, facility = true, severity = true, 
        priority = true, msg = true, raw_data = true
    }
    
    for key, value in pairs(event) do
        if not mapped_fields[key] and 
           key ~= "class_uid" and key ~= "category_uid" and key ~= "activity_id" and
           key ~= "type_uid" and key ~= "severity_id" and key ~= "metadata" and
           key ~= "unmapped" and key ~= "src_endpoint" and key ~= "dst_endpoint" and
           key ~= "connection_info" and key ~= "rule" and key ~= "device" and
           key ~= "disposition" and key ~= "disposition_id" and key ~= "activity_name" and
           key ~= "class_name" and key ~= "category_name" then
            event.unmapped[key] = value
        end
    end
    
    -- Generate unique ID
    event.uid = string_format("barracuda_%d_%s", event.time, 
                              event.src_endpoint and event.src_endpoint.ip or "unknown")
    
    -- Emit the transformed event
    emit(event)
end
